* **IMMZD2DTDTPEncounterElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTDTPEncounterElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTDTPEncounterElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-29 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTDTPEncounterElements |

 
This library defines encounter-based elements for DTP used throughout the Immunization CPG 

* * **Content: **application/elm+xml: ````Encoded data (167348 characters)````: **Id: **
